caption_text: Arrows point from each service to what it depends on — core is required by four, the one bottleneck

cards.dims_superseded: objecthood law: the in-degree metric folds into the hero's sub line (the hand file floated it as a below-card pill), widening the crown past the hand ratio; census and structure laws still pin

census_amendments.note: objecthood law (ratified): frames confer objecthood — the specimen's below-card in-degree pill reads as a sibling object, not an annotation; the metric folds into the hero's sub line and the render carries no floating pill. Badge/pin annotation kinds are deleted under this law.
